Pending policies · awaiting issue or pay

Edit Policy

What is this? Enter a dollar amount to manually override the pending commission for this policy. Use this if a chargeback, split, or other adjustment means the calculated amount is wrong. Leave blank to let the system calculate it automatically from AP × comp level and the payout schedule.

Carrier Bonuses

On top of your base commission, each carrier runs their own bonus programs throughout the year:

+10% Temporary commission increases on select products
✈ International trips and prizes for top producers
$$$ Cash bonuses paid out quarterly or annually

Check your carrier portals for the current incentives they are running.

Manager Bonus

$150K
Monthly Volume Threshold

The manager bonus kicks in once your overall agency volume hits $150K per month in issued paid business.

Important Notes
  • Levels must be achieved 2 months in a row to take effect.
  • All metrics are based on issued paid business.

← Back to sign in

Set a new password for your account.

Don't know it? Click here to find out

How to Find Your Discord User ID

  1. Open Discord (desktop or mobile)
  2. Go to Settings (gear icon ⚙️)
  3. Scroll down to Advanced
  4. Toggle on Developer Mode
  5. Go back and tap/right-click your own name
  6. Select Copy User ID
  7. Paste it into the field — it'll look like 123456789012345678

You can always add this later from your profile settings.

⚠️
